name: Blueprint Stack: ProgSeq + Multi-scale RoPE + ByteEmbed (1xRTX 3080)
blurb: Non-record, single-GPU exploration. 10L blueprint stack with progressive sequence length (512->1024->2048), grouped multi-scale RoPE (4 KV groups, bases 1K/10K/100K/1M), byte-level token embeddings (dim 64), and mixed-bit export (int5 MLP, int6 attn/bigram/byte + zstd). Trained 10 min on 1xRTX 3080 (3647 steps, 164.5 ms/step, loss still dropping). Systematic ablation of 12 leaderboard techniques across 3 phases found most 8xH100-proven techniques hurt on single GPU due to step-time overhead.
author: Blakethefn
